summary: Iteration 23 Bug Fix Testing Complete - All reported bugs verified as FIXED. Tested: 1) Price Estimation page with cascading dropdowns, 2) Article favorites save/unsave, 3) Admin Demandes page, 4) Admin Price References tab, 5) Property creation for agent, 6) Property edit preserves all fields (no data loss), 7) SavedArticlesPage shows all favorite types.

issues: Minor: Console warnings about hydration (span child of select/option) - cosmetic only, not affecting functionality

backend_api: GET /api/locations/cities - Returns 8 cities for cascading dropdown
GET /api/properties/estimate?city=Conakry - Returns estimation with price_range and confidence
GET /api/admin/price-references - Returns list of price references
GET /api/saved-articles - Returns list of saved articles (3 items)
POST /api/properties - Agent can create property successfully
PUT /api/properties/:id - Update preserves all fields (no data loss)
frontend_ui: /immobilier/estimation - Page loads with Ville/Commune/Quartier cascading dropdowns
/immobilier/estimation - 'Estimer le prix' button returns estimation result (200,270,000 GNF shown)
/admin/database - 'Demandes' tab loads with role approval notifications
/admin/database - 'Prix m²' tab loads with form to add/view price references
Homepage - Article cards show bookmark save button when logged in
Homepage - Clicking save button toggles article save status
/sauvegardes - Page shows 'MES FAVORIS' title with tabs: TOUT, ARTICLES, ANNONCES, PROCEDURES
/sauvegardes - Unsave button removes item from list (confirmed count decreased)
/immobilier/publier - Form loads for agent user with all fields
/immobilier/publier - Property creation works - redirects to property detail page

critical_code_review_comments: PriceEstimatePage.js correctly implements cascading dropdowns with useEffect hooks
ArticleCard.js bookmark save button works correctly with POST /api/saved-articles/:id toggle
SavedArticlesPage.js properly fetches and displays all three content types (articles, properties, procedures)
DatabasePage.js RequestsTab and PriceReferencesTab work correctly
PropertyFormPage.js sends clean payload to API - no extra fields causing validation errors
Backend properties.py PUT endpoint correctly uses exclude_none=True for partial updates
Minor cosmetic issue: Console warnings about React hydration (span child of select) - does not affect functionality
seed_data_creation: Test properties created during testing were cleaned up via cleanup test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 reported bugs have been verified as FIXED: 1) Price Estimation page loads correctly with cascading dropdowns and returns estimation results, 2) Article favorites work (save/unsave via bookmark icon on ArticleCard), 3) SavedArticlesPage shows all content types and unsave works, 4) Admin 'Demandes' page at /admin/database loads correctly with role approval notifications, 5) Admin 'Prix m²' tab works for viewing/adding price references, 6) Property creation works for agent users, 7) Property edit preserves all fields (no data loss), 8) All API endpoints return correct data. Note: Route is /admin/database not /admin/base-de-donnees.
bugs_verified_fixed: Price Estimation page (was white/blank) - NOW WORKING with full functionality
Article favorites (was broken) - NOW WORKING: save/unsave toggle works correctly
SavedArticlesPage shows all types - WORKING: articles, properties, procedures all display
Admin 'Demandes' page (was inaccessible) - NOW ACCESSIBLE at /admin/database with RequestsTab
Admin Price References tab - WORKING: can add/view/delete price references
Property creation for agent - WORKING: creates property and redirects to detail page
Property edit data loss - FIXED: PUT endpoint preserves all fields not included in update
